label: Secondary text unit label, e.g. name of a secondary or unidentified text
locus: Locus of the secondary text unit, e.g. f. 1r

work.desc_title: Descriptive title for an unidentified or unlinked work, e.g. Prefatory table or index

note.value: This is a minimal text unit record using desc_title rather than a linked work ARK, showing the unlinked work pattern.
